note: Engine submodule of clientside_validation: loads jQuery Validate and enforces the base module's data-rule attributes. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts (settings, library install, Drush, per-form classes); no site mutation.

evals.prompt: What does the clientside_validation_jquery submodule add on top of the base clientside_validation module?
evals.expected_output: It loads the jQuery Validate plugin (the engine) and enforces the data-rule-*/data-msg- attributes the base module writes, plus adds pattern and equal_to validators and CKEditor/Inline Form Errors integration.

evals.prompt: I don't want to load jQuery Validate from a CDN. How do I download the library locally on a Drupal site using drush?
evals.expected_output: Run drush cvjld (clientside_validation_jquery:library-download) to fetch jQuery Validation 1.21.0 into libraries/jquery-validation; cvjls checks status, cvjlr removes it.

evals.prompt: Which config object and keys control whether clientside_validation_jquery uses a CDN for jQuery Validate and which CDN URL?
evals.expected_output: The clientside_validation_jquery.settings config object; use_cdn (default false) toggles CDN, cdn_base_url sets the base URL (default jsDelivr jquery-validation@1.21.0).

evals.prompt: How do I make an AJAX form validate on the client before it submits with clientside_validation_jquery?
evals.expected_output: Add the class cv-validate-before-ajax to the form; the validate_all_ajax_forms setting controls validating AJAX forms before submit.

evals.prompt: Where is the settings form for the jQuery clientside validation engine and what permission gates it?
evals.expected_output: Route clientside_validation_jquery.settings_form at /admin/config/user-interface/clientside-validation-jquery-settings, gated by 'administer site configuration'.

evals.prompt: Which two validator plugins does clientside_validation_jquery add beyond the base module's set?
evals.expected_output: It adds the pattern (regex) and equal_to (field-matches-field) CvValidator plugins.

evals.prompt: Which clientside_validation_jquery setting makes native HTML5 validation run before the jQuery validation layer?
evals.expected_output: The force_html5_validation key (default false) on clientside_validation_jquery.settings forces HTML5 validation first.
